## Runtime.IRuntimeContext.getIngredient() method

Gets a resolved runtime ingredient by ID. Results are cached for efficient repeated access.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getIngredient(id: IngredientId): Result<IRuntimeIngredient>;
```
